title: Tommy Battles the Silver Sea Dragon
original_title: Tommy Battles the Silver Sea Dragon
overview: Tommy Silver stands trial in an epic musical fantasy where he must reckon with the guilt of his mother's death before it destroys him and the one he loves. Part nightmare, part daydream - as if Kafka and Gondry made a musical.
